spec_match.rationale: Phenomenal demonstration that constructs real MediaSource objects, executes actual range removals, handles Chrome 138's native InvalidStateError exceptions, and intercepts console.warn to detect deprecation warnings.

interactive.rationale: Superb execution with live, executable buttons that demonstrate the deprecation and the async-safety pattern in real-time.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Clearly outlines the race risks in asynchronous MSE queueing that led to the deprecation.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes a solid MediaSource presence check on load, displaying clear status notices and gracefully avoiding crashes on unsupported environments.

references.rationale: Provides a valid reference link to ChromeStatus entry 5190983595327488.

design_system.rationale: Matches repo colors, borders, shadows, and typography tokens seamlessly.

summary: A masterclass in showcase demo engineering. It builds a live, native MediaSource session, actively triggers and catches modern InvalidStateError exceptions, mocks console.warn to prove the deprecation warnings exist, and shows the robust Promise-based upgrade fix.
